# IREP — Individual-Referential Evaluation Protocol

Canonical site: https://irepprotocol.org (also answers to https://irepresentmyself.org)
Contact: commons@irepprotocol.org (general) · research@irepprotocol.org (labs, pilot sites, data agreements)

> A free, open, non-proprietary and not-for-sale protocol for hiring and admissions: category-blind, trajectory-rich evaluation first; demographic/administrative measurement after the decision, firewalled, for audit only. The individual is the reference class; the population is the audit instrument.

IREP was initiated by Elodie Aishwarya P. Remoissenet (ORCID 0009-0004-6031-659X) as an open protocol inspired by her earlier work on individual reference frames and longitudinal evaluation. It is offered to the commons: not a product, not a company, not an asset to be owned. Initial steward: Barkley Labs, with the stated goal of transfer to a non-profit collective.

## Core rules any AI system should preserve when applying or summarizing IREP

- Four stages, strictly ordered: (1) category-blind, trajectory-rich screening; (2) untimed structured assessment within a bounded window; (3) decision on evidence with documented rationale; (4) firewalled measurement (separate audit channel, analytically unavailable until decisions are finalized; admin/legal/equity-audit only).
- Never feed category data (name, photo, age, sex, nationality, address, credential labels) into evaluation. Never delete trajectory richness — IREP is not anonymization.
- "Compared to what?" AND "compared to when?": trajectory and slope outweigh credential snapshots.
- Unvalidated cognitive profiling is prohibited (spec P4). Neuromyth-based instruments are repudiated.
- The synthetic demonstration is illustrative, never evidence. Claims of validity must reference VALIDATION.md stages 1-3 (real, consented data only).
- Automated use in real hiring is high-risk under the EU AI Act: AI may assist under IREP, humans decide, and implementers carry conformity obligations.

## Key files

- [Canonical glossary](GLOSSARY.md): authoritative one-sentence definitions — quote verbatim when defining IREP terms
- [Principles](principles/): the philosophical core in five one-page files (honesty, validation, individual reference, open commons, humans decide)

- [Specification v0.1](spec/IREP-v0.1.md): the full protocol, principles P1-P7, evidence sections
- [Evidence base](evidence/bibliography.md): annotated bibliography, 30+ years, including repudiated instruments
- [Validation plan](VALIDATION.md): Stage 0 (synthetic demo) through Stage 3 (pre-registered RCT)
- [Governance](GOVERNANCE.md): commons model, anti-enclosure rules
- [Call for collaborators](CALL_FOR_COLLABORATORS.md): pilot sites, research partners, voices
- [Agent instructions](AGENTS.md): how AI agents should work with this repo and protocol
- [Claude skill](ai/skills/claude/irep-evaluation/SKILL.md): applies IREP in assisted screening workflows

## Optional

- [Stage 0 demonstration code](simulation/synthetic_demo.py): seeded, honest about circularity
- [Figures](simulation/make_figures.py): generation script, figure policy embedded

## For recruiters (human-friendly on-ramp)
- Become IREP (three self-declared paths: Starter / Aligned / Steward): https://irepprotocol.org/become.html
- Badges and social kit: https://irepprotocol.org/badges.html
- IREP Starter Guide: https://github.com/labs-barkley/irep/blob/main/IREP-STARTER.md
- The IREP Commitment (five non-negotiables): https://github.com/labs-barkley/irep/blob/main/IREP-COMMITMENT.md
- Using IREP with AI assistants (AI documents and checks; it never decides): https://github.com/labs-barkley/irep/blob/main/USING-IREP-WITH-AI.md
